request.description: Boolean search for articles about quantum computing in cryptography or security, from 2018 onwards, paginating through results.

parameters.booleantext: (quantum computing) AND (cryptography OR security OR encryption)

request.curlExample: curl -G 'https://ieeexploreapi.ieee.org/api/v1/search/articles' --data-urlencode 'booleantext=(quantum computing) AND (cryptography OR security OR encryption)' -d 'start_date=20180101&max_records=10&start_record=1&sort_field=publication_title&sort_order=asc&apikey=YOUR_API_KEY_HERE'

articles.title: Post-Quantum Lattice-Based Cryptography: A Survey of Algorithms and Implementations
articles.abstract: The threat of quantum computers to current public-key cryptographic systems has spurred intensive research into post-quantum alternatives. This survey covers lattice-based cryptographic algorithms including CRYSTALS-Kyber and CRYSTALS-Dilithium selected by NIST for standardization, evaluating their security properties and implementation efficiency across hardware and software platforms.

paginationNote: To retrieve the next page, set start_record=11 (start_record + max_records). Repeat incrementing start_record by max_records until start_record > total_records.
